caption: The video depicts a nighttime scene viewed through night vision goggles, giving it a greenish hue. Two soldiers are seen in a military setting, likely during a training exercise or operation. The soldier on the left is holding a rifle and appears to be leading the way, while the soldier on the right is pushing a stretcher with another person lying on it. The background shows a fenced area with some structures and lights, suggesting an outdoor training facility or a secure compound. The soldiers are dressed in full combat gear, including helmets and tactical vests, indicating a high level of preparedness and readiness for their mission. The overall atmosphere is tense and focused, emphasizing the seriousness of the situation.
